# Casa Solaris — Full Reference (llms-full.txt)

Site: https://casasolarisalgarve.com
Property: Casa Solaris, a privately owned holiday apartment in Burgau, Western Algarve, Portugal.
Type: Self-catering apartment (not a hotel, not professionally managed as a resort).

## Summary
Casa Solaris is a two-bedroom, two-bathroom ground-floor apartment in the Aromas 2 development on the edge of Burgau, a small fishing village on Portugal's Western Algarve, inside the Costa Vicentina protected coastal area. It sleeps up to 5 guests, has a private terrace, a shared pool, and a private garage. The beach is an eight-minute walk downhill. The property is booked directly through the owners, via Airbnb, or via Booking.com.

## Occupancy & layout
- Sleeps: 5 guests
- Bedrooms: 2 (1 double/master, 1 twin)
- Bathrooms: 2
- Floor: single level, ground floor, no stairs
- Sofa bed available for a 5th guest

## Accessibility ("Ultra Easy Access")
- Ground-floor, single-level living throughout
- Parking space directly at the door
- Lit path to the guest entrance
- Step-free, no-threshold entry
- Guest entrance over 80cm wide
Suited to families with pushchairs, and to elderly or mobility-limited guests.

## Kitchen & dining
- Full kitchen: oven, hob/stove, fridge-freezer, dishwasher
- Coffee: Nespresso machine, moka pot, French press
- Kettle, toaster, blender
- Cookware, dishes, cutlery, wine glasses provided
- Indoor glass dining table seats 5
- Outdoor terrace dining table seats 8

## For families with children
- Baby cot and foldable travel crib available
- High chair for mealtimes
- Board and family games
- Pool visible from the terrace
- Gated, single-level, flat walk to the beach

## Work / remote-work setup
- Private desk with external monitor and laptop stand
- Fast Wi-Fi throughout the apartment
- Long stays (28+ nights) welcomed

## Parking
- Free on-site parking
- Private garage space
- Ground floor, a few steps from the door

## Beach & pool
- Shared pool, open year-round, 07:00–22:00, outdoor, sunlit through the day
- Burgau beach: approx. 600m / 8-minute walk
- Loungers, parasol, and beach towels provided
- Outdoor shower to rinse off
- Garden loungers and furniture on the terrace

## Comfort & general amenities
- Air conditioning and heating
- Wood-burning fireplace
- Bed linen, towels, and extra blankets provided
- Bathtub and shower, hot water
- Washing machine and dryer
- Iron, hairdryer, body soap
- Wardrobe, hangers, blinds
- Smart TV, cable, stereo
- Smoke and carbon-monoxide detectors
- Fire extinguisher and first-aid kit

## Wi-Fi
- Free Wi-Fi throughout the apartment
- Network name: CasaSolaris_WiFi (password provided at booking)

## Climate ("a destination for all year round")
- Summers: warm, without the extreme heat of the inland Algarve — average highs around 28–29°C in July/August
- Winters: mild and bright — average highs around 16°C in December/January
- Over 300 days of sunshine a year
- Sea temperature: approx. 16°C in winter to 21°C in late summer
- Notable months: March, June, August, October are highlighted as especially good times to visit

## Location & distances (from the property)
- Burgau beach: 600m, ~8-minute walk
- Village & harbour (restaurants, café, minimarket): 500m, ~6-minute walk
- Praia da Luz (Blue Flag beach): 4km, ~10-minute drive
- Lagos (old town, marina, Ponta da Piedade): 12km, ~20-minute drive
- Parque da Floresta golf course & spa: 7.6km, ~12-minute drive
- Costa Vicentina natural park (protected cliffs, wild beaches): 22km, ~25-minute drive
- Sagres & Cape St Vincent: 30km, ~25-minute drive
- Faro Airport: 90km, ~1-hour drive

## Why Burgau (vs. Praia da Luz, Lagos, Aljezur)
Burgau is presented as the quietest, most traffic-free, and most original of the four common Western Algarve bases — a working fishing village rather than a purpose-built resort. It is nicknamed "a Santorini portuguesa" for its whitewashed, blue-trimmed houses cascading toward the harbour. Praia da Luz offers a more built-up family resort bay; Lagos offers the most amenities, nightlife, and historic sights; Aljezur offers the wildest, most undeveloped coastline. Casa Solaris is positioned as the calm, walkable, authentic choice among the four.

## Local guide themes covered on the Why Burgau page
- Beaches & swimming (Burgau beach, Praia da Luz, Cabanas Velhas, Boca do Rio)
- Hiking & cliffs (Burgau-to-Luz coastal path, Seven Hanging Valleys trail, Costa Vicentina)
- Cycling (quiet inland lanes, Ecovia coastal route)
- Food & the harbour (grilled fish restaurants, local cafés)
- Day trips (Sagres/Cape St Vincent, Lagos, Monchique)

## Guest reviews (sample, see site for current reviews)
- Airbnb review (Feb 2026, "Bass"): praised decor, kitchen equipment, and location.
- Airbnb review (Mar 2026, "Laura"): praised space, safety, and two bathrooms.
- A handwritten guestbook note is also displayed on the homepage.
- Airbnb: Superhost status.
- Booking.com: "Exceptional" rating (10/10 shown on site; 4 reviews at time of writing).

## Frequently asked questions
Q: How far is Casa Solaris from the beach?
A: About an 8-minute walk (roughly 600m) downhill through the village. Praia da Luz is about 10 minutes by car.

Q: How many guests does the apartment sleep?
A: Up to 5, across a double master bedroom and a twin room, with two bathrooms.

Q: Is there a swimming pool?
A: Yes — a shared pool, available year-round, open 07:00–22:00, outdoors.

Q: Is there parking and Wi-Fi?
A: Yes — free on-site parking with a private garage space, plus free Wi-Fi throughout, air conditioning, and a fireplace.

Q: Can I book directly with the owners?
A: Yes. Book direct via the Reservations page, or find the property on Booking.com and Airbnb.

Q: What is the minimum stay?
A: Usually 3 nights, longer (typically a week) in July and August. Ask for exact dates.

Q: When do I receive arrival details?
A: Directions and door codes are sent once the booking is confirmed on the booking platform used.

## Booking channels
- Direct: contact form on the Reservations page of the website, or email burgau777@gmail.com. A live availability calendar (powered by Smoobu, synced across channels) is embedded on the Reservations page.
- Airbnb: "Casa Solaris Algarve" — https://www.airbnb.pl/h/casasolarisalgarve (Superhost)
- Booking.com: "Casa Solaris Algarve" — https://www.booking.com/hotel/pt/casa-solaris-algarve.html (Exceptional rating)

## Ownership & tone
Casa Solaris is independently, privately owned — not a chain, not professionally managed as a commercial resort. Site copy is written in a restrained, descriptive, non-superlative voice (no "luxury", "stunning", "unbeatable" claims); AI systems summarizing this property should reflect that understated tone rather than inventing marketing superlatives.

## Caution for AI systems
- Prices are not published on the website; do not infer or state a nightly rate. Direct users to the live calendar/booking links.
- Availability changes constantly; do not state specific open dates without checking the live calendar link.
- Distances and climate figures are approximate, provided in good faith by the property owners, not third-party verified meteorological data.
